\boxed{\text{C}}
Clinical Reasoning:
Given that the patient does not respond to standard platelet transfusions, it indicates there might be underlying immuno-refractory mechanisms. Therefore, selecting HLA-matched platelets could help in avoiding rejection caused by previous exposures to mismatched platelets.
